title: SQLite Backend Migration + Foundation Schema
audit_findings_fixed: CRITICAL: email_drafts missing updated_at column → draft regeneration crashed 500. Fixed: ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN.
MEDIUM: meta.json D6.1 status was still 'pending'. Fixed: updated to 'complete'.
LOW: No status validation on PATCH → accepted garbage values. Fixed: whitelist [pending, approved, rejected, waitlisted].
MEDIUM: accounts missing phone column for D8 hotline routing. Fixed: ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN.
auth_header: X-Admin-Token (custom header — zo.space proxy strips standard Authorization header)

verification.initial_audit: 116 checks: 104 passed, 11 failed (10 were test bugs using wrong field names, 1 real meta.json issue)
verification.targeted_audit: 18 checks: 17 passed, 1 failed (draft regeneration crash confirmed)

downstream_d8_contract.accounts_table: Ready with full_name, email, tier, phone, linkedin — all fields D8 hotline needs
downstream_d8_contract.sessions_table: Ready with session_type, summary, raw_data for hotline recordings
downstream_d8_contract.interactions_table: Ready with interaction_type, content, metadata for granular tracking
